app.name: Blitztext
settings.title: Blitztext – Settings
settings.model.label: Model
settings.model.hint: Model is downloaded on first launch. Changing requires app restart.
settings.language.label: Language
settings.prompt.label: Dictionary / Technical terms
settings.prompt.hint: Terms whisper.cpp should know — improves recognition of names and technical vocabulary.
settings.section.api: Claude API (for Plus / Rage / Emoji modes)
settings.apiKey.label: Anthropic API Key
settings.apiKey.hint: Stored locally in config.json – never transmitted.
settings.hotkey.label: Global Hotkey
settings.mic.label: Microphone
settings.ttsVoice.label: Voice
settings.ttsReplace.hint: Term (left) is replaced by pronunciation (right) when reading aloud.
settings.uilang.label: UI language
correction.title: Blitztext – Corrections
correction.label: Recognized text (correct and save):
correction.hint: Changes will be saved as a correction rule.
